episodes.title: O Sinners!, by Nicole Cuffy
episodes.description: First-time guest Bryn joins us to discuss O Sinners!, by Nicole Cuffy, a book about a cult that we all agreed has a bunch of interesting threads, but never quite weaves them together. Spoilers from 45 mins

episodes.title: Dinner for Vampires, by Bethany Joy Lenz
episodes.description: We discuss the shocking memoir of One Tree Hill star Bethany Joy Lenz, who was in a cult for over a decade. We also have a special guest, the person who recommended this book, Alayne!
